37.reason: [This resets k to 0 but does not null-terminate s or process the word collected so far. Words are only processed when a non-letter is encountered, but resetting k without processing leads to lost words. Also, '-' is incorrectly treated as part of a word per problem definition (only letters allowed).]

59.reason: [sizeof(a[1]) should be sizeof(struct dic) or sizeof(a[0]). Using a[1] is misleading and may cause issues if array indexing changes, though it works here. However, more critically, the program never processes the last word if the file doesn't end with a non-letter character.]
